summary: Iteration 11 — Targeted audit of the 9 user-reported bugs on Nati Fenua. Backend pytest 7/7 PASSED (privacy toggle, private profile blocking, post-with-friends-privacy, new_comment notification, comments listing, stories endpoint, RSS images distinct). Frontend mobile (390x844) verified: 1a Publication trigger (tabs only switch mode, ZERO upload requests) PASS, 1b Camera capture button (visible at x=155 y=740 w=80 h=80) PASS, 2a Story viewer (portal, rect 0,0,390,844 = full viewport) PASS, 2b Comments display (modal opens, existing comment 'TEST_iter11 comment a105ff' from Demo Fenua visible, header 'Commentaires (1)') PASS, 3e(i) GDPR delete modal (portal child of body, position:fixed, full viewport, z=100) PASS, 3e(ii) EditProfile inline delete panel (visible in viewport top=491/bottom=653/vh=844) PASS, 3c Privacy (toggle persists, blocks other users, friends saved on post) PASS, 3f Comment notification (in-app notification with post_id in data dict) PASS. ONLY REMAINING BUG: 3d Share — `navigator.clipboard.writeText` has NO FALLBACK so 'Copier le lien' toasts 'Erreur lors de la copie' in restricted contexts (iframe, automation, non-secure-origin). 3a Vendor dish photo edit: could not test — demo user has no vendor profile and /vendor shows 'Devenir vendeur' onboarding instead.

minor.issue: Anti-spam rate-limits sandbox test creation: 'Email temporaire ou alias détecté, Limite d'inscriptions atteinte pour cette adresse IP (3 aujourd'hui)' — used existing beta tester instead. Consider whitelisting +alias for QA in non-prod.
(carried from iter 10) Manual UserCreate(**raw) returns 500 instead of 422 on validation errors.

ui_bugs.component: ShareModal.js (handleCopyLink at line 72-81 and Instagram action at 61-68)
ui_bugs.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText has NO FALLBACK — when the browser blocks clipboard (iframe / no user-activation / non-HTTPS context / older Safari), the catch fires `toast.error('Erreur lors de la copie')` and the user can't copy the link. Verified live in sandbox: clicking [data-testid='share-copy-btn'] produced the 'Erreur lors de la copie' toast. This IS the share bug the user is reporting.

integration_issues.issue: Could not exercise: demo@nati-fenua.com has no vendor profile so /vendor redirects to /vendor/dashboard onboarding ('Devenir vendeur'). /vendor-dashboard (no slash) redirects to home. Need a seeded user WITH vendor + dishes to verify the photo upload UI exists. If feature truly doesn't exist for menu-dish images, main agent must implement it.

issues: [data-testid='share-modal-backdrop'] bounding box reports y=-396, height=14300px on 390x844 viewport — visually it presents as a bottom sheet so the user-facing UX is fine, but the height value is symptomatic of an over-tall fixed container that may break layouts on edge cases. Worth double-checking the inset-0 + overflow rules.

passed_tests: BE pytest 7/7: rss_images_distinct, visibility_toggle_persists, private_profile_blocks_other_user, post_with_friends_privacy, comment_notification (new_comment in notifications, post_id in data dict), comments_listing_works, stories_endpoint

FE 1a CreatePostPage tabs: clicking post-type-video → post-type-story → post-type-link → post-type-photo triggered ZERO POST/PUT to /api/posts, /api/upload, /api/stories. Publication only fires on the publish-btn submit path.

FE 1b Camera capture: clicking 'Caméra' opens fullscreen camera (fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black), [data-testid='camera-capture-btn'] visible at x=155 y=740 w=80 h=80 on iPhone-size viewport. White circle + orange/pink gradient inner disc rendered.

FE 2a Story viewer: clicking [data-testid='story-demo_story'] opened modal in createPortal(document.body) — parent .fixed.inset-0.z-[100].bg-black with rect (0,0,390,844) and [data-testid='story-image'] at (0, 84, 390, 675).

FE 2b Comments modal: clicking [data-testid='comment-btn-{post_id}'] opens modal, header 'Commentaires (1)', existing comment 'TEST_iter11 comment a105ff' visible with author 'Demo Fenua' and timestamp.

FE 3e(i) GDPR delete: trigger button on Supprimer-mon-compte card opens [data-testid='delete-account-modal'] which is DIRECT child of <body> (createPortal), position=fixed, z-index=100, rect=(0,0,390,844). Inner card with 'Confirmer la suppression' visible.
FE 3e(ii) EditProfile inline panel: clicking the Supprimer trigger reveals [data-testid='delete-confirm-panel'] at top=491 bottom=653 vh=844 in_viewport=true — auto-scrollIntoView fix is working.
action_items: (P1) Fix ShareModal copy fallback at /app/frontend/src/components/ShareModal.js lines 72-81 (handleCopyLink) and 61-68 (Instagram action): wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in a try/catch with a fallback using `document.execCommand('copy')` against a temporary <textarea> appended to document.body, OR display the URL in an always-visible <input readonly value={shareUrl}> the user can manually select. Current behaviour shows 'Erreur lors de la copie' toast and link is NEVER copied in any sandboxed/iframe/insecure context. This is the share bug the user is complaining about.

(P2) Clarify vendor dish-photo-edit (bug 3a): either (a) seed demo user with a vendor profile + dishes so the photo upload UI can be exercised, or (b) confirm the feature doesn't exist and implement upload UI in VendorDashboardPage menu/dish list. Demo currently sees the 'Devenir vendeur' onboarding only.
(P3) Investigate ShareModal backdrop reporting height=14300px (should equal viewport height). Visually OK but suspect inner overflow.
(P3, carried) Replace manual UserCreate(**raw) at server.py:752 with FastAPI body-injected pydantic to return 422 on missing fields.

(P3) Add a missing [data-testid='share-twitterx-btn'] (currently the X/Twitter button matches the dynamic `share-${name.lower}-btn` pattern with name='X / Twitter' → testid becomes 'share-xtwitter-btn' which is not what review-request expects). Consider canonical testid per platform.
critical_code_review_comments: ShareModal.js:72-81 — `await navigator.clipboard.writeText(shareUrl); ... catch { toast.error('Erreur lors de la copie'); }` provides ZERO recovery path. Per MDN, clipboard.writeText throws in insecure contexts, in cross-origin iframes, when permission is denied, and pre-Safari-13.4. Add a fallback: `const ta=document.createElement('textarea'); ta.value=shareUrl; ta.style.position='fixed'; ta.style.opacity='0'; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select(); document.execCommand('copy'); document.body.removeChild(ta); toast.success('Lien copié !');`. Mirror in the Instagram action at line 61-68.

GDPRSettingsPage.js — Supprimer-mon-compte trigger button at line 264-271 has no data-testid and only an icon. Add `data-testid='gdpr-delete-trigger-btn'` and an aria-label='Supprimer mon compte' for accessibility + reliable testing.

FeedPage StoryItem (line 454) — `story_clickable` filter relied on data-testid prefix only. Working but consider canonicalizing to [data-testid='story-avatar-{group_id}'] to disambiguate from inner [data-testid='story-image']/'story-video'/'story-viewer-close'.
Server.py send_comment_notification at 3552 — notification stores post_id under `data.post_id`, not at top-level. Frontend bell-icon dropdown should already handle this; just keep schema consistent.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bugs_iter11.py (NEW — 7 pytest cases for the 9 reported bugs)

success_rate.frontend: 87.5% (7/8 bugs verified-fixed, 1 still broken: share copy-link)

test_credentials.secondary_for_cross_user_tests: teiva.mauri@gmail.com / Test1234@ (existing beta — fresh register blocked by anti-spam in sandbox)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_iter11 posts (one as demo, one as secondary), 1 TEST_iter11 comment, 1 in-app new_comment notification for secondary user. Demo's privacy toggled to private then reverted to public. Recommend cleanup query: db.posts.deleteMany({caption: /^TEST_iter11/}), db.comments.deleteMany({content: /^TEST_iter11/}), db.notifications.deleteMany({type: 'new_comment', 'data.post_id': /^post_/, message: /TEST_iter11/}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Skip onboarding via localStorage.setItem('nati_fenua_onboarding_seen','1'). Login page is /auth (not /login). Demo creds: demo@nati-fenua.com/DemoFenua2026!. /vendor redirects to /vendor/dashboard which shows 'Devenir vendeur' onboarding for users without a vendor profile — to test dish-photo-edit you need a user WITH vendor profile (use beta accounts or seed one). Backend reg is rate-limited; use existing beta accounts (teiva.mauri@gmail.com/Test1234@) for secondary-user flows. Only outstanding UI bug: ShareModal copy link fails silently (no fallback for navigator.clipboard.writeText). All other previously-reported bugs are confirmed fixed by current code (createPortal for story+gdpr modals, scrollIntoView for edit-profile delete panel, privacy testids, post_id in notification data dict).
rca_of_the_issue: BUG 3d (Share copy link): At /app/frontend/src/components/ShareModal.js the handleCopyLink (line 72-81) and Instagram action (61-68) use `navigator.clipboard.writeText` inside a try/await/catch — but the catch only shows a toast.error and never falls back. In our sandboxed preview iframe + headless browser, the Clipboard API rejects (DOMException 'NotAllowedError' or 'Permission denied'); same will happen for users on (a) older Safari/Edge, (b) any non-secure-origin install, (c) any embedded webview without clipboard permission. Repro: open feed → click any [data-testid='share-btn-{post_id}'] → click [data-testid='share-copy-btn'] → toast 'Erreur lors de la copie' appears and clipboard remains untouched. Fix: legacy fallback via temporary textarea + document.execCommand('copy'), wrapped in another try/catch — and ideally surface the share URL in a readonly input (already present at [data-testid='share-link-input']) so the user can manually select-and-copy as a last resort.
